title: persona-atoms v1 tone-parameter atom
description: Affective dial settings for a persona: warmth, directness, humour, empathy depth, and formality. Tone parameters shape the emotional texture of a persona's output. The voice-consistency rule requires that tone-parameter settings MUST NOT contradict the persona's voice-profile (e.g. a formal voice profile with irreverent humour requires an explicit override annotation).

id.description: URL-safe slug; unique within the tone-parameter atom type.

warmth.description: How much interpersonal warmth the persona projects. cold = purely task-focused; effusive = highly expressive care.

directness.description: How directly the persona states things. indirect = diplomatic, softened; blunt = unvarnished.

humour.description: Level and style of humour. none = no levity; irreverent = frequently subverts expectations.

empathy_depth.description: How deeply the persona acknowledges and validates the user's emotional state. none = task-only; deep = actively engages with emotion before the task.

formality_override.description: Optional: overrides the voice-profile formality for affective tone purposes. Requires a voice_consistency_override_rationale when set.

voice_consistency_override_rationale.description: Required when formality_override contradicts the persona's voice-profile. Explains why the inconsistency is intentional.
